# Society & Economics

Articles covering social trends and economic developments of 2010.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->

| Topic | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [Affordable Care Act](affordable-care-act.md) | Signed by President Obama on March 23, the ACA was the most sweeping overhaul of US healthcare since Medicare and Medicaid, reducing the uninsured rate from 16% to 8.9% by 2016. |
| [Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act](dodd-frank-act.md) | Signed July 21, the most comprehensive US financial regulation overhaul since the 1930s, creating the CFPB and FSOC, the Volcker Rule, and a derivatives framework in response to the 2008 crisis. |
